user.title: Find a charging station
user.description: Pick a point and radius on the map. Charging stations found in that area will be listed in the next step. The map defaults to your Home Assistant home location.

reconfigure.title: Re-centre the search
reconfigure.description: Adjust the point and radius used to locate this station. The station itself stays the same; use this if it dropped off because its search area no longer covers it.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the InCharge service. Please try again.
error.no_stations: No charging stations found in that area. Try a larger radius or move the point.

abort.already_configured: This charging station is already added.

init.title: Options
init.description: How often should Home Assistant check this station's availability?
